title: Open Data
description: Data freely accessible, usable, modifiable, and shareable for any purpose, subject only to attribution or share-alike requirements, as defined by the Open Definition.

definitions.definition: Data freely accessible, usable, modifiable, and shareable for any purpose, subject only to attribution or share-alike requirements, as defined by the Open Definition.

- [opendatahandbook.org](https://opendatahandbook.org/)
